description: Default capability set for the Termixion main and settings windows: PTY command/channel core permissions plus trmx-48 auto-update (updater/process), external-link opening (opener), the trmx-51 cross-window settings/update events, the trmx-54 start-dragging grant (not in core:window:default) that makes the settings window's data-tauri-drag-region chrome actually drag, the trmx-64 set-title grant (core:default only carries the read-side allow-title) so OSC 0/2 terminal titles reach the native window, and the trmx-74 close grant so the frontend closes the main window when the last tab closes.
